assertion_results.text: Output starts with 'feat' as the commit type since new functions are being added
Output includes a scope in parentheses (e.g., 'string-helpers' or 'utils')
Subject line (first line) is 50 characters or fewer in total
assertion_results.evidence: 'feat(string-helpers): add truncate and URL utils' is 49 characters

assertion_results.text: Subject line uses imperative mood (e.g., 'add' not 'added' or 'adds')
First letter after the colon-space is lowercase
Subject line does not end with a period
Output mentions both truncate and URL validation functionality
assertion_results.evidence: Subject mentions 'truncate and URL utils', body mentions 'truncate()' and 'isValidUrl()'
